title: astragalus nevadensis subsp. andres-molinae
intro: Astragalus nevadensis subsp. andres-molinae, also known as Andres Molina's milkvetch, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). It is an herbaceous perennial with medicinal properties, traditionally used to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. The health benefits of Astragalus nevadensis subsp. andres-molinae include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and enhance the body's natural defenses against infections. This plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being and longevity.
